mapper.select:
SELECT TOP 100 ISNULL(A.AGNT_NM, '') AS CUST_NM, M.MTRL_CD AS MTRL_CD, M.MTRL_NM AS MTRL_NM, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(S.STOCK_QTY AS BIGINT)), 0) AS QTY FROM dbo.TBL_MTRL_M M LEFT JOIN dbo.TBL_AGENCY_M A ON M.CMPY_CD = A.CMPY_CD AND M.AGNT_CD = A.AGNT_CD LEFT JOIN dbo.TBL_STOCK S ON M.CMPY_CD = S.CMPY_CD AND M.AGNT_CD = S.AGNT_CD AND M.MTRL_CD = S.MTRL_CD
AND (
M.MTRL_NM LIKE '%' + #{t} + '%'
)
AND ( M.MTRL_CD LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR M.MTRL_NM LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR M.BARCODE = #{keyword} )
GROUP BY A.AGNT_NM, M.MTRL_CD, M.MTRL_NM HAVING COALESCE(SUM(CAST(S.STOCK_QTY AS BIGINT)), 0) > 0 ORDER BY M.MTRL_NM, M.MTRL_CD

SELECT D.ZONE_ID, D.ZONE_NM AS zoneNm,
E.LOC_ID AS locId, E.LOC_CD AS locCd, E.LOC_NM AS locNm,
C.MTRL_CD AS mtrlCd, C.MTRL_NM AS mtrlNm,
COALESCE(SUM(CAST(A.STOCK_QTY AS BIGINT)), 0) AS qty FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M E JOIN TBL_WH_ZONE_M D ON E.ZONE_ID = D.ZONE_ID
-- 재고가 없어도 랙은 나와야 하므로 LEFT JOIN LEFT JOIN TBL_STOCK A ON E.LOC_ID = A.LOC_ID AND A.STOCK_QTY > 0 -- 재고 0인 '껍데기' 데이터는 제외하고 조인
-- 상품 정보도 재고가 있을 때만 붙음 LEFT JOIN TBL_MTRL_M C ON A.MTRL_CD = C.MTRL_CD
AND ( E.LOC_CD LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR E.LOC_NM LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR C.MTRL_NM LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' )
GROUP BY D.ZONE_ID, D.ZONE_NM, E.LOC_ID, E.LOC_CD, E.LOC_NM, C.MTRL_CD, C.MTRL_NM
HAVING COALESCE(SUM(CAST(A.STOCK_QTY AS BIGINT)), 0) = 0
ORDER BY D.ZONE_NM, E.LOC_CD, C.MTRL_NM

SELECT TOP 300 S.AGNT_CD AS AGNT_CD, MAX(A.AGNT_NM) AS AGNT_NM, -- GroupBy 집계함수 처리 S.MTRL_CD AS MTRL_CD, MAX(M.MTRL_NM) AS MTRL_NM, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(S.STOCK_QTY AS BIGINT)), 0) AS QTY FROM TBL_STOCK S INNER JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M A ON S.CMPY_CD = A.CMPY_CD AND S.AGNT_CD = A.AGNT_CD INNER JOIN TBL_MTRL_M M ON S.CMPY_CD = M.CMPY_CD AND S.AGNT_CD = M.AGNT_CD AND S.MTRL_CD = M.MTRL_CD WHERE S.STOCK_QTY > 0 GROUP BY S.AGNT_CD, S.MTRL_CD ORDER BY MAX(A.AGNT_NM), MAX(M.MTRL_NM)

SELECT L.LOC_CD AS LOC_CD, Z.ZONE_NM AS ZONE_NM, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(S.STOCK_QTY AS BIGINT)), 0) AS QTY FROM TBL_STOCK S INNER JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M L ON S.LOC_ID = L.LOC_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WH_ZONE_M Z ON L.ZONE_ID = Z.ZONE_ID WHERE S.AGNT_CD = #{custCd} AND S.MTRL_CD = #{mtrlCd} AND S.STOCK_QTY > 0 GROUP BY L.LOC_CD, Z.ZONE_NM ORDER BY L.LOC_CD
